videos.title: How AI generated code impacts open source
videos.summary: This video explores how AI-generated code affects open-source projects. It highlights how the low cost of creating pull requests clashes with the high cost of reviewing them, creating a bottleneck for maintainers.

timestamps.topic: Asymmetric costs in PR creation vs. review
The challenge of vetting complex PRs
Impact on open-source dynamics

videos.title: [S01:E14] Harga minyak Diesel turun jadi isu politik? - Dr. Aimi, Economist
videos.summary: This video offers a concise analysis of Malaysia's fiscal policies, focusing on the targeted Budi Diesel subsidies and the economic dynamics of Johor. It provides crucial insights into how these policies aim to curb smuggling while addressing regional wage disparities and brain drain to Singapore.

timestamps.topic: Targeted Budi Diesel Subsidies
Johor Wages and Brain Drain

videos.title: Being T20 in Malaysia Doesn’t Actually Mean You’re Rich | In The Studio
videos.summary: This discussion debunks the misconception that all T20 earners in Malaysia are wealthy, highlighting the vast disparities and financial vulnerabilities within this bracket. It offers a crucial reality check on how location, family size, and asset structures impact actual disposable income, making it essential viewing for understanding modern economic policy.

timestamps.topic: The statistical definition and relative nature of T20
How household demographics create vastly different financial realities within the same bracket

videos.title: How to Get Hired When 120,000 Engineers Got Laid Off
videos.summary: This video offers a realistic yet empowering look at the current tech job market, explaining how AI is reshaping hiring and layoffs. It provides actionable strategies on how to stand out by treating LinkedIn as a dynamic portfolio rather than a static resume. Viewers will walk away with practical tips on personal branding and networking to future-proof their careers.

timestamps.topic: The State of the Tech Job Market & AI Layoffs
Transforming LinkedIn from a CV into a Portfolio

videos.title: Own your engineering career, no one else will
videos.summary: This video highlights the importance of adaptability, soft skills, and personal ownership in driving long-term career growth. It challenges conventional views of success, emphasizing that thriving in a changing workplace requires resilience and proactive feedback.

timestamps.topic: Hard skills vs. adaptability
Taking ownership of your career growth

videos.title: 40 Harsh Life Lessons I Wish I Knew in My 20s
videos.summary: This video offers a wealth of practical life advice from a 56-year-old entrepreneur reflecting on the crucial lessons he wishes he had known in his twenties. Spanning personal finance, health, relationship building, and career growth, his insights provide a useful roadmap to avoid common youthful pitfalls. It serves as a high-impact guide for anyone looking to build better habits and secure a stronger future.

timestamps.topic: Essential habits for personal growth, time management, and health
Practical advice on managing personal finance and building relationships
Developing a daily habit of learning and staying informed

videos.title: Gemma Playground: Parallel Agents in Action
videos.summary: This video showcases Gemma 4's multi-agent capabilities, demonstrating how an orchestrator agent can spawn ten independent sub-agents to generate SVG art simultaneously on a local machine. It highlights the impressive speed of parallel processing, showing how local, high-performance AI can streamline complex tasks from creative art generation to enterprise workflows.

timestamps.topic: Introducing Gemma 4's parallel agent capabilities
Parallel execution and local model benchmarking
Scaling multi-agent workflows to enterprise tasks

videos.title: What caused this React app to crash?
videos.summary: This video presents a quick challenge for developers, focusing on a CI pipeline bug that occurred after upgrading React. It is a great test of debugging skills, prompting viewers to identify why a faster build led to a production crash.

timestamps.topic: The React upgrade and production crash scenario
Evaluating potential causes of the build failure

videos.title: Gemma 4 and the AI Edge Gallery: On-Device AI Gets an Upgrade
videos.summary: This video offers an inside look at Gemma 4 and the AI Edge Gallery, showcasing how powerful language models can now run completely offline on your smartphone. Discover how features like "Agent Skills" and multimodal inputs enable on-device translation, summarization, and task automation. It's a must-watch for anyone interested in the future of private, fast, and local artificial intelligence.

timestamps.topic: Overview of Gemma 4's launch and model sizes
Expanding capabilities with Agent Skills and MCP
Real-world on-device multimodal use cases

videos.title: What to teach when AI writes the code | Rainer Stropek | TEDxLinz
videos.summary: If you are worried about AI writing code faster than you can, this talk is your survival guide. Learn why code syntax is no longer your primary leverage point and discover the high-value systems-thinking skills you must master to remain irreplaceable.

videos.title: How to speak powerfully in the age of AI | Louise Beale | TEDxNorthampton
videos.summary: This engaging talk explores how to maintain powerful communication skills in the rapidly advancing era of artificial intelligence. Through personal anecdotes from a television reporter, it highlights why human empathy, nuance, and authentic connection remain irreplaceable by technology.

timestamps.topic: The value of human connection over AI facts
The 'A SMILE' preparation framework

videos.title: The Production AI Playbook: Deploying Agents at Enterprise Scale — Sandipan Bhaumik, Databricks
videos.summary: Deploying AI in production often fails when teams focus on selecting models instead of establishing reliable evaluation and monitoring. This talk introduces a practical five-pillar framework to help you build observable, measurable, and highly scalable enterprise AI systems.

timestamps.topic: The common trap of AI deployment
The five pillars of production AI
Reorganizing the build order: Case study

videos.title: How to actually change your habits | Kim Foster | TEDxSurrey
videos.summary: This insightful TEDx talk reveals that the true obstacle to lasting personal change is not a lack of willpower, but rather a clash with our established identity. By shifting our focus from what we 'do' to who we believe we 'are', we can easily align our habits with our desired future self.

timestamps.topic: The voting study: shifting from doing to being
The OS metaphor: why new habits fail on an old identity

videos.title: Why ALLAH Made the Nafs the Hardest Battle of Your Life
videos.summary: This video offers a crucial spiritual perspective on why standard self-help and productivity systems fail, tracing the root cause to an undisciplined inner self (nafs). By understanding the psychological traps of desires and heedlessness, viewers will learn a simple 10-minute nightly reflection practice to regain self-control and live more intentionally.

timestamps.topic: The three inner weapons of the nafs: desire, heedlessness, and whispers
Why external productivity tools fail without purifying the heart first
The 10-minute nightly self-accounting practice (Muhasaba) for daily progress

videos.title: The 3 Skills I'd Learn In the Age of AI
videos.summary: This video outlines the essential skills needed to remain highly valuable and competitive as artificial intelligence continues to automate traditional job roles. The speaker explains how shifting your focus toward AI integration, direct revenue generation, and personal branding can future-proof your career. The core takeaway is that professionals who actively drive business growth and establish authority in their niche will remain indispensable in an AI-driven economy.

timestamps.topic: Mastering AI tools and staying on the cutting edge
Why staying close to revenue generation secures your career
Understanding the difference between cost centers and profit centers
